---
title: "Style Attribute Demo"
format: revealjs
---

## Basic Style Example

::: {.r-fit-text style="color: red;"}
This text is red
:::

## Multiple Properties

::: {style="font-size: 2em; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;"}
Styled content
:::

## Image with Style

![](image.png){style="border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px;"}

## Inline Style

[Highlighted text]{style="background-color: yellow; padding: 0.2em;"}

## Complex Styling

::: {.fragment style="opacity: 0.8; transform: scale(1.1);"}
Animated and styled
:::
